by Alissa Bantigue & Nina Fedorczuk
2024 TRENDS

OMG APAC Trends is an annual publication that 
covers consumer, media and technology trends 
that shape the year ahead and beyond. 
Its intention is to inspire and future proof you as 
well as spark your curiosity for what’s to come!
This report is a close collaboration between Omnicom Media Group 
agencies across APAC.

We are ready. 
Are you?

For the last three years, OMG 
Futures has visited the Slush start-
up conference in Helsinki to better 
understand the technology themes 
set to impact our future, and in turn, 
produce a report that businesses 
and brands can use to prepare for 
the next decade. 
Previous reports highlighted 
evolutions in sustainability, work 
environments, medicine, transport, 
and media and technology, with the 
aim of illuminating the shape of 
things to come. This year we swell 
our knowledge further, focusing on 
17 new start-ups that tell us about 
where we might be heading as we 
move closer to the 2030s. 
If you’re not aware of Slush, it might 
well be the best tech conference 
you’ve never heard of. Unlike other 
conferences, rather than a focus on 
consumer or retail tech, it instead 
emphasises frontier solutions to 
big global challenges: from climate 
change to healthcare and disease,

FUTURE
BACK
TO THE
In 2022 OMG Futures produced At The Edge: The Next Decade In Tech. 
After visiting the Slush start-up conference in Helsinki, we detailed 
five future signals shaping the next decade of humanity - Gentle Tech, 
Frugal Tech, Ultra-Telepresence, Optimising Work and Sustainability 
As Standard. We predicted that these signals would change the face of 
businesses and brands, and, by extension, their consumers also. 
This year we’ve returned to Slush, to step Closer to the Edge, and to 
stare further into the future. With this latest report, we’re bringing 
you a set of brand new signals inspired by the ever-evolving tech 
start-up landscape. Slush is most likely the best tech conference 
you’ve never heard of. In its 14th year, it is home to a plethora of 
cutting edge start-ups and future
We hope you find it useful in preparing your business for the future.

Introduction
Relentlessly Relevant Brands 2023

What Makes 
a Brand 
Relentlessly 
Relevant?
Relentless relevance — the kind that makes brands indispensable and stands the 
test of time — matters more than ever. Consumers know it, and we’re happy to say 
that more brands do too. Now in its eighth year, our ongoing measurement reflects 
that a record 90% of brands raised their relevance scores from the prior year. And 
consumers reported finding these brands an average of 13% more relevant. 
We surveyed 11,500 U.S. consumers to measure how well brands appeal both to their 
heads and hearts. Both approaches are essential. Yet this year’s study shows that 
the heart is becoming increasingly important. It’s not that pragmatic features and 
benefits don’t matter.
